title: FTSE 100 joins global stock market fall as US and Iran exchange fire - business live
summary_full: Rolling coverage of the latest economic and financial newsEuropean stock markets are taking a more decisive turn downwards now – the UK’s FTSE 100 has fallen 0.5%. The German Dax is down 0.6% and the French Cac 40 is down 0.3%.The Europe Stoxx 600 is down 0.4%. Continue reading...
